summary: Recent updates to the WebRTC web API, particularly in the `RTCPeerConnection` component, focused on improving the functionality and structure of the code. One notable change is the implementation of the `getRemoteCertificates` method, which allows developers to retrieve certificate information from a remote peer during a video call, enhancing the security and reliability of peer connections. Additionally, there were internal improvements, including the migration of a UUID generator to use `UniquePtr`, which optimizes memory management. Although these changes are mostly behind the scenes, they contribute to a more robust and efficient handling of real-time communication features.
